title: Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones (trade paperback)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:Aotctpb.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode II —
Attack of the Clones'' |writer=[[Henry Gilroy]] |penciller=[[Jan Duursema]] |inker=[[Ray Kryssing]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David McCaig|Dave McCaig]] |cover artist=[[Drew Struzan]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[April 24]], [[2002]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/11-177/Star-Wars-Episode-II----Attack-of-the-Clones-TPB|text=Star Wars: Episode II -- Attack of the Clones TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=144 |isbn=1569716099 |isbn2= |timeline=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones'']] |issues= |preceded by=[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)|''Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' hardcover]] |followed by=[[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (trade paperback)|''Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' trade paperback]] }} '''''Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones''''' collects all four issues from the [[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones'' comic adaptation]] series of comics. It was released on [[April 24]], [[2002]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Dark Horse Comics proudly continues the comics adaptation of the long-awaited second Episode of the ''Star Wars'' saga. Adapted for comics by Henry Gilroy from an original screenplay by George Lucas and Jonathan Hales, this series tells of a young Jedi coming of age, forbidden love, and a threat that has been a decade in the planning…'' ''Artfully illustrated by Jan Duursema and Ray Kryssing, this four-issue series is a must for the serious ''Star Wars'' collector.'' ==Development== The cover for this trade paperback was originally commissioned to be illustrated by artist [[Tsuneo Sanda]] before Dark Horse decided on using the movie poster by Drew Struzan. Tsuneo Sanda's art was recycled and displayed in ''[[Star Wars Tales 12]]''. ==Contents== *''[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 2]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 3]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 4]]'' ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Aotctpb.jpg|Cover File:SWT12-AOTC.jpg|Original commissioned cover by [[Tsuneo Sanda]] File:AOTC-TPBtextless-EC.png|Textless final cover File:AotccomicPl.jpg|Polish - ''Star Wars: Atak klonów'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/11-177/Star-Wars-Episode-II----Attack-of-the-Clones-TPB|text=Star Wars: Episode II -- Attack of the Clones TPB}} {{Interlang |ja=スター・ウォーズ エピソード2 クローンの攻撃（コミック） |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი II: კლონების შეტევა (რბილყდიანი კრებული) |pl=Atak klonów (wydanie zbiorcze) }} [[Category:Comic film adaptations|2]] [[Category:Dark Horse Comics trade paperbacks|Episode 2]] [[Category:Legends trade paperbacks|Episode 2]]
